Mtn To Deem Matters Admitted And Req For Sanctions; Notice Of Non-Appearance; Ntc Of Lodgment
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on MON-JUL-08-2013:
HEATHER E. CASSELL [415.221.3541], defendant appears in Propria Persona;
No other appearances.

R U L I N G - Defendant in Propria Persona did not notify the moving party of her appearance this day nor submit an opposition to the motion. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion to Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED. $3,000 in sanctions are awarded. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Disco Responses And Req For Sanctions; Ntc Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on MON-JUL-08-2013:
HEATHER E. CASSELL [415.221.3541], defendant appears in Propria Persona;
No other appearances.

R U L I N G - Defendant in Propria Persona did not notify the moving party of her appearance this day nor submit an opposition to this motion. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. $3,000 in sanctions are awarded. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
